sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ تَحْقِيقُ التَّوَازُنِ بَيْنَ الْعَمَلِ وَالْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je postići ravnotežu između posla i života.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to achieve balance between work and life.

sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي خَالِدٌ عُطْلَةَ نِهَايَةِ الْأُسْبُوعِ مَعَ عَائِلَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Halid provodi vikend sa svojom porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: Khaled spends the weekend with his family.

sentences.arabic: يَعُودُ إِلَى وَظِيفَتِهِ يَوْمَ الِاثْنَيْنِ بِنَشَاطٍ وَطَاقَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Vraća se na svoj posao u ponedjeljak s aktivnošću i energijom.
sentences.translationEn: He returns to his job on Monday with activity and energy.
